name: Buffalo Chicken Wings#3
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tips off the chicken wings and cut each wing in half at the joint.
2. Heat 2 inches of salad oil to 375°F in a 4-quart saucepan.
3. Lower the wings into the hot oil and fry for 15 minutes, or until very tender.
4. Drain the wings on paper towels.
5. In a large bowl, stir together Tabasco Sauce and melted butter until well blended.
6. Add the fried chicken wings to the bowl and gently toss to coat evenly.
7. Serve with blue cheese dressing, chilled celery sticks, and chilled carrot sticks.
